transcript.text:
Which is more important?
It's all black pigs that are grilled
So which is more important?
1, 2, 3, 4 places
Which is more important?!
Those 4 restaurants are important
[On my way to all of them!]
It has been passed down for 4 generations
An original grilling method
It comes from 18 years of experience
We opened in 2003
I learned it from my mother in law
I'll just take 4 servings, please
4 servings, please
3 servings, please
[Should we clock out?]

[Politeness]
Where's all of that going to?
How many servings is that?
14 servings total just for the grilled pork
[County of Gokseong, South Jeolla Province, South Korea]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Gokseong today
I remember I enjoyed watching the movie "Gokseong"
I thought this place would be scary
But it's not like that at all
Before I get some food,
I had to come check out their famous train village
I will look around for a bit
It's not fun riding this by myself
I'm hungry!
Let's go eat

[Seokgok-myeon of Gokseong is the middle point that connects the cities Suncheon and Gwangju, where bus drivers actually stopped by and enjoyed grilled beef bulgogi during their breaks]
The drivers would come stop by to eat grilled bulgogi here
You must try it You won't regret
There are 4 famous restaurants
This restaurant has been in business since 1903
[Quick maths]
[We didn't expect it either]
[Almost 120 years]
[Passed down for 4 generations]
Started with my grandmother We're the 4th generation
Looks delicious
Thank you
Looks so good
[2 servings each grill plate]
I wasn't expecting much because they tend to give small portions for grilled bulgogi
But this is a lot of food

Bon appetit
Look at that fat and the juice
So good
It's not spicy
It's more on the sweeter side
The texture of the fat is rather crunchy
It's really good
Now for the soy sauce based bulgogi
Yum
That smoky flavor
Let's try mixing them together
4 pieces
So if they had 100 years of tradition, did this taste the same 100 years ago?
Wouldn't this be so good back then?
Gotta eat it with rice
It goes so well with white rice

Put some rice
Garlic
Salted hairtail guts
Anything else? Nope
I need more rice
You must eat this with rice It tastes even better
[Almost did what Tzuyang does best]
Last piece
I don't feel like I've eaten anything
Let's head to our next restaurant
They said it will take me about 20 steps to the other restaurant
I'm already here
[2nd grilled bulgogi restaurant]
They had this here
To keep your food warm
Excuse me,

Can I have 4 servings of grilled black pig bulgogi
I won't give you any more after that (jokes)
It's here
Is it ready to eat? Yes
Thank you
Looks good
Our boss also does a lot of beekeeping
Honey?
We use that honey to make the gochujang (red chili paste)
[The restaurant owner getting his organic honey]
[Using that honey to make the gochujang]
The meat is thick
The texture will be nice
Bon appetit
I love it
It tastes completely different from the previous one

The meat is very thick
You can really feel the fat
It's very tender
It fills your mouth with the chewiness
Just like the pork skin
It's crispy The outside part is chewy
It's sweet probably because they used honey
The sweetness is very rich in flavor
Tasty
I usually only like the fat part of the meat
I love the texture of it
I'm only able to put so many in the wrap because it's so thick
There's ssamjang here too (soybean seasoning paste)
I think this will go really well with it
It goes well as a lettuce wrap
The county of Gokseong has been known for its black pigs

How can the texture be like this?
The black pig definitely has a different texture in its meat
The taste of honey is very strong
It's very apparent in the flavoring
The sauce on the bottom is very honey-like
2nd restaurant down
Let's head to the 3rd one
Apples!
This is such a nice view
There's like a stream here
Tada~ I'm here at the 3rd restaurant
I'm looking forward to how different it will be
I will order 3 servings from now
Excuse me,
I will take 3 servings of grilled bulgogi, please
Thank you

Thank you
It looks very similar to the first restaurant
It's thin
Looks tasty
That's good
I think it's very average
The thickness is average
The seasoning is perfect
I saw here on TV promoting local businesses
So lovely
I get to see her this close
It's tasty!
You're so cute
She is just so pretty when she eats
It's delicious
The meat is very tender

I think this is what all black pigs have
Its fat is very chewy
The texture is very different from a regular pork
The meat is so soft
Hot
There's a huge window here
The scenery is very nice I can see mountains and rivers
It's a good place to eat with a nice view
So yummy
[Gulping down soda]
[Brings out tea because soda is not healthy] Thank you
[This "nutritious tea" is brewed by the owner herself]
Enjoy Thank you
Tasty
Let's eat
[Stomach growls]

[Soda is not good for you]
4 servings at the first place, 4 servings at the second,
I ate 11 servings so far
I'm starting to feel it now
Let's head to the next restaurant
[The 4th grilled bulgogi restaurant]
It's our last restaurant
Hello
Excuse me,
Do you have a recommendation?
I would say the grilled black pig bulgogi with stone pot rice
Again?
I just ate 11 servings of that
All restaurant have their unique taste
Thank you
You can just give me 1 bowl of lettuce

3 people are going to eat, no?
No, I will be the only one eating
My mother in law taught me her recipe after I got married
It's been told from long ago that this place is the best for black pigs to grow atmosphere-wise
Thank you
I'm able to smell the smokiness right away
Let's try it Last restaurant
I think that was just fat
Stone pot rice is the best
The meat is very tender
Is it crunchy?
Very chewy
The smoky flavor just spreads all over my mouth
The seasoning sauce is delicious, but
They used the meat very well to compliment the sauce
Stone pot rice is the truth

This rice is so tasty
She's good at eating
She's a mukbang pro?
Hello
How many servings is that?
I just had 11 servings
I just ordered 3 servings here
Then it must not taste as good right now Food tastes best when you're hungry
I'm getting full, but this is still very delicious
It's really good as a radish wrap
They have a lot of different vegetables here for wraps
Some rice here
With meat
And the fat
Top it off with garlic
I was expecting this to be something like a lettuce wrap

But it's completely different Both the flavoring and the texture
You can taste the distinct radish taste
It's soft and juicy
But I like it straight without anything
[Can't let rice go to waste]
So this is why they gave me hot water
I was supposed to do this, but I forgot
You're supposed to scoop the rice out,
Put in hot water and put the lid on
Then it boils
I've missed the timing
It smells amazing
That's amazing
So good
The rice is so good Do you see the color?
That was a good meal

I enjoyed it so much despite it being my 4th restaurant of the day
I'm feeling full now that I had 14 servings
I came to Gokseong today to try their grilled bulgogi
I liked the train village
And really enjoyed the food here
I think it's a great place to bring your family or your significant other
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
